title: Vanilla Deconstructed
description:
A mod that goes and takes away things from Minecraft.
(Dont Worry It Replaces them)
body:
This mod was created because I thought the idea of Vanilla+ was dumb so I decided to make Vanilla Minus. This mod's first feature is taking away three of your four crafting inventory slots. It then forces you to craft a two by two crafting table and then spend some more time just to be able to craft a three by three (I changed the recipe for that one).

Here are some features:
Dirt Clumps - Crafted with one dirt. Can be placed. 
Dirt Crafting Table - Crafting with one dirt clump.
Silt - Crafted with gravel. Can be broken to obtain iron nuggets.
Iron Chunks - Crafted with three iron nuggets. Can use three of these to make an iron ingot
Any blocks in this mod are edible(I am not sure why you are eating them though).

This mod is still not finished and I plan to add many, many more recipes and custom items.
If you have any suggestions/feedback give it to me in this discord: [https://discord.gg/3NCvbtxXGt](https://discord.gg/3NCvbtxXGt)

Crafting Table Recipe 🤯
